problem id: 1fd65d86
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00100101 -> 01001000
  11100010 -> 11001010
  01101101 -> 11011100
  01000101 -> 10001110
  10011011 -> 00111111
  01010111 -> 10101011
  10010011 -> 00101111
  11011001 -> 10111111
  01001100 -> 10011100

query: 10100001
predicted answer: 01001000
